selected_candidate: Add a dedicated final-rollup ready-node denial fixture and regression validating schema, denial fields, and Feature Depth actionability.
rejected_candidates: Reuse the older final-rollup fixture; rejected because it lacks the current Feature Depth contract fields.
Only rely on CLI-generated rollups; rejected because a checked fixture gives stable readback contract coverage.
Treat ready nodes as terminal blocker; rejected because ready work requires continuation, not final blocker closure.
decision_basis: Ready-node denial is a core premature-return guard and needs a fixture that validates the public final rollup shape.
